summary: Completed testing for NT Commerce POS page fixes and barcode support. Found and fixed critical bug in POS search functionality. All 5 requested features verified.

bugs_fixed.issue: POS search was using wrong field names (p.name, p.code, p.price) instead of correct API response fields (p.name_ar, p.name_en, p.article_code, p.retail_price)
bugs_fixed.fix: Updated search filter to use name_ar, name_en, article_code, barcode fields. Updated search result display to show correct product name and price.

critical_code_review_comments: POS page has correct RTL layout with Arabic (dir=rtl)
10 product shortcuts displayed correctly on right sidebar
Task menu with 10 items working in left sidebar
Search dropdown now properly shows product name_ar/name_en and retail_price
Added search-results-dropdown class to fix overlay click interception
Barcode scanner support implemented in ProductAutocomplete.js with rapid input detection
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features verified: 1) Products page displays correctly with RTL, 2) Add Product page works via /products/add with auto-generated article code and barcode, 3) POS page has correct RTL layout with 10 shortcuts visible under 'اختصارات', 4) POS search bar now works correctly - FIXED wrong field names (was searching p.name instead of p.name_ar), 5) Navigation between pages works. Search by Arabic name (سامسونج) and barcode (123456789) both work correctly now.

products_page.details: Products displayed in grid view with RTL Arabic layout, add/edit buttons visible

add_product_ui.details: Form at /products/add with fields: اسم المنتج, كود المنتج (auto-generated AR####), prices, barcode (auto-generated EAN-13), عائلات المنتجات

pos_page_rtl.details: Full RTL layout verified - title 'نقطة البيع', dir=rtl on html/body, Arabic labels throughout

pos_shortcuts_10.details: 10 product shortcuts displayed under 'اختصارات' section, 2-column grid layout

pos_search.bug_found: Search filter was using wrong field names - p.name, p.code, p.price
pos_search.fix_applied: Changed to p.name_ar, p.name_en, p.article_code, p.barcode for search; p.retail_price for price display
pos_search.details: Search now works for Arabic product names and barcodes

navigation.details: Navigation between Dashboard, Products, POS, Customers pages all working
